title: A Choice
content:
They please me not--these solemn songs
    That hint of sermons covered up.
    'Tis true the world should heed its wrongs,
    But in a poem let me sup,
    Not simples brewed to cure or ease
    Humanity's confessed disease,
    But the spirit-wine of a singing line,
    Or a dew-drop in a honey cup!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Laurence Dunbar delivers a powerful performance in "A Choice"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
